## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] The change is scoped to a single skill or repository concern.
- [ ] New or updated skills include `skills/<skill-name>/SKILL.md`.
- [ ] `SKILL.md` includes `name` and `description` frontmatter.
- [ ] Agent-specific metadata is included only when required by the target tool.
- [ ] Local paths, credentials, private URLs, and workspace-specific details have been removed.
- [ ] Documentation is updated if installation, usage, or available skills changed.

---

## Description

<!-- Summarize what changed, why it is useful, and which skill, agent, or repository area is affected. -->

## Type of Contribution

<!-- Select one or more: new skill, update to an existing skill, documentation, repository tooling or maintenance, other. -->

## Validation

<!-- List checks, commands, review steps, or agent/tool verification performed. If not applicable, explain why. -->
